terms of sales, profits and turnover. We will be moving more towards high-end
products. More multinational companies will set up shop or will recruit more people.
The outsourcing boom will continue. There will be new records set. India will become
the backbone of world back office processing, which I have repeated many times.
Many BPO companies will see changes. Selling, merging and redefining will be
common. .{true}
Vehicles: There will be many first-time car buyers. The automobile industry will do
well. The cars of the all segments, other than luxury will do well. Most of them are
very good picks in the markets. In the two-wheeler segment, the 100ccs will do well.
The makers of vehicles like Maruthi, Bajaj Honda and TVS will have new peaks in
sales. FMCG will do better in the rural markets than in the urban markets. They will
have better time after the month of august. They will not be in forefront in terms of
sales and volumes. Lever will still be shaky. -.{true}
